title: [BLT] Boats, Lily, Tolerance
description: Boats are no longer effected by lily pads.
body:
Boats are no longer effected by lily pads, now you can sail with no obstructions!

Report bugs / suggestions in my [Discord](https://discord.gg/vrekW2ZPbp)

Yes you can use this in your modpack as long as credit is appropriately given.
